reviews.comment:
Paré a cargar nafta y a desayunar.
Cargué nafta, pero me fui a desayunar a otro lado. Había preparado un espacio  bastante cutre para los pasajeros del hotel y para los clientes como yo... nada, tan sólo un servicio antipático con café de filtro y panadería rancia. Obviamente no llegué a sentarme, simplemente seguí hasta la próxima estación de servicio, una Axion que está a unos 600 metros sobre la ruta 3.

(Translated by Google)
I stopped to fill up with gas and have breakfast.
I filled up with gas, but went to have breakfast somewhere else. They had set up a pretty shabby space for hotel guests and customers like me... nothing, just unfriendly service with filter coffee and stale pastries. Obviously, I didn't even sit down; I just kept going to the next gas station, an Axion about 600 meters away on Route 3.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNenBueC13RRAB

reviews.comment:
Paramos a tomar un cafe nos dieron medialunas viejas cuando tenian del dia de hoy. Nos encajaron media docena de medialunas duras.

(Translated by Google)
We stopped for coffee and they gave us stale croissants even though they had fresh ones from today. They foisted half a dozen hard croissants on us.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNdXNHOXl3RRAB
